languages.text: "Предать отца? Нет. Для такого одних ваших заверений недостаточно. Докажите, что вы друг династии: распутайте дело Гапрака. А я тем временем поразмыслю, сколь далеко готова зайти".

traits.locale_text: "Предать отца? Нет. Для такого одних ваших заверений недостаточно. Докажите, что вы друг династии: распутайте дело Гапрака. А я тем временем поразмыслю, сколь далеко готова зайти".

languages.text: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."
languages.original_text: "Предать отца? Нет. Для такого одних ваших заверений недостаточно. Докажите, что вы друг династии: распутайте дело Гапрака. А я тем временем поразмыслю, сколь далеко готова зайти".

traits.locale_text: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."
"Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."
"Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."

languages.text: “背弃我的父亲？不。光凭你这几句空口白话可不够。想证明你是王朝的朋友，那就先把贾帕克家的案子查清楚。在此期间，我会仔细掂量，自己究竟能做到哪一步。”
languages.original_text: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."

traits.locale_text: “背弃我的父亲？不。光凭你这几句空口白话可不够。想证明你是王朝的朋友，那就先把贾帕克家的案子查清楚。在此期间，我会仔细掂量，自己究竟能做到哪一步。”

languages.text: « Je ne trahirai pas mon père sur la seule foi de vos allégations. Prouvez que vous êtes {mf|un ami|une amie} de la dynastie : élucidez l'affaire Gaprak. Pendant ce temps, je réfléchirai aux moyens que je suis prête à mettre en œuvre. »
languages.original_text: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne trahirai pas mon père sur la seule foi de vos allégations. Prouvez que vous êtes {mf|un ami|une amie} de la dynastie : élucidez l'affaire Gaprak. Pendant ce temps, je réfléchirai aux moyens que je suis prête à mettre en œuvre. »

languages.text: "Babama ihanet mi edeceğim? Asla. Yalnızca sözlerinize imtina ederek böyle bir şeyi yapamam. Hanedanlığın dostu olduğunuzu kanıtlayacaksınız. Gaprak davasını çözeceksiniz. O zamana dek ben de ne kadar ileri gidebileceğimi düşüneceğim."
languages.original_text: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."

traits.locale_text: "Babama ihanet mi edeceğim? Asla. Yalnızca sözlerinize imtina ederek böyle bir şeyi yapamam. Hanedanlığın dostu olduğunuzu kanıtlayacaksınız. Gaprak davasını çözeceksiniz. O zamana dek ben de ne kadar ileri gidebileceğimi düşüneceğim."

languages.text: «¿Traicionar a mi padre? No. Su certeza no es suficiente. Demuestre que es un{mf||a} amig{mf|o|a} de la dinastía: resuelva el caso de Gaprak. Hasta entonces, me plantearé hasta dónde estoy dispuesta a llegar».
languages.original_text: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."

traits.locale_text: «¿Traicionar a mi padre? No. Su certeza no es suficiente. Demuestre que es un{mf||a} amig{mf|o|a} de la dinastía: resuelva el caso de Gaprak. Hasta entonces, me plantearé hasta dónde estoy dispuesta a llegar».

languages.text: "Ich soll meinen Vater verraten? Nein. Dazu reichen Eure Versicherungen allein nicht aus. Beweist, dass Ihr {mf|ein Freund|eine Freundin} der Dynastie seid: Löst den Gaprak-Fall. Ich überlege mir einstweilen, wie weit zu gehen ich bereit bin."
languages.original_text: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."

traits.locale_text: "Ich soll meinen Vater verraten? Nein. Dazu reichen Eure Versicherungen allein nicht aus. Beweist, dass Ihr {mf|ein Freund|eine Freundin} der Dynastie seid: Löst den Gaprak-Fall. Ich überlege mir einstweilen, wie weit zu gehen ich bereit bin."

languages.text: 「父を裏切る？断る。君の一言では足りない。王朝にとっての友であることを証明せよ。ギャプラク事件を解決せよ。その間、私はどこまで許せるか考える。」
languages.original_text: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."

traits.locale_text: 「父を裏切る？断る。君の一言では足りない。王朝にとっての友であることを証明せよ。ギャプラク事件を解決せよ。その間、私はどこまで許せるか考える。」
